texto: If one believed in angels one would feel that they must love us best when we are asleep and cannot hurt each other
autor: and what a mercy it is that once in every twenty-four hours we are too utterly weary to go on being unkind.
explicacao: Orientação direta de and what a mercy it is that once in every twenty-four hours we are too utterly weary to go on being unkind. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “If one believed in angels one would feel that they must love us best when we are asleep and canno…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, elizabeth-von-arnim, the-solitary-summer, útil em momentos de the-solitary-summer.
